keyPoints: Meaning-oriented framing of AI tasks that connects daily work to long-term growth, mastery, and meaningful impact
PERMA+4 as the design and measurement scaffold for well-being, engagement, and long-run transfer
Autonomy-supportive design to boost intrinsic motivation and prevent over-control or surveillance
Deliberate practice, mentorship, and cross-functional collaboration to build competence and relatedness
Longitudinal evaluation designs (6-12 months) with repeated PERMA+4 and transfer indicators
Rigorous comparison of meaning-oriented vs efficiency-oriented framing using multi-level I/T/S outcomes
Cross-cultural validation and invariance checks for PERMA+4 measures in multinational AI teams
